Fun fact…

Spoilers for Season 16…

When Ash gets Charizard back in Black And White: Adventures In Unova, he is a lot more obedient. This could be down to Ash having traveled across several regions and actually *winning* more badges. Even in B/W alone, Ash won all 8 of those badges, legitimately, even when the odds were against him (lost one of the three matches in Striaton, lost against Lenora in Nacrene).

Only problem with this theory is that, in the games, Pokemon only ever disobey you IF THEY ARE TRADED from another game copy or save file (with a different trainer ID and original trainer name). 

Obviously collecting all gym badges prevents the disobedience at different level thresholds, but generally speaking, a Pokemon that did not come from a previous owner will ALWAYS obey REGARDLESS of level and number of badges.
